scripts.build: rm -rf dist tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && tsc && pnpm exec esbuild src/bin/environment-daemon.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --banner:js='import { createRequire as __bbCreateRequire } from "node:module"; const require = __bbCreateRequire(import.meta.url);' --outfile=dist/environment-daemon.bundle.mjs
